name: confluence-intranet-mirror
description: Mirror Confluence intranet for AI-powered Q&A

scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -d confluence_mirror
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d confluence_mirror -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-postgres-search.sql && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d confluence_mirror -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/02-pgvector.sql && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d confluence_mirror -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/03-halfvec.sql
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres
